title: Book Scroll
description: Navigate quickly (or slowly) through your finished or unfinished books using the scroll wheel!
body: # 📚 Book Scroll - **Navigate quickly** through Book and Quills & Written Books by scrolling! - **Speed up or slow down** by holding down CTRL or SHIFT respectively. - **Client-side**, no need to have this on the server! - **Scroll Sensitivity** is accounted for. - **Works with other mods** like [Book and Quick Save](https://modrinth.com/mod/book-and-quick-save) & [Long Books](https://modrinth.com/mod/long-books).
